segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a university classroom. Good afternoon, students. Just a quick reminder about the upcoming deadline for your digital storytelling project. Final submissions are due next Friday. Your project should include a narrated video that combines images, voiceover, and background music to tell a personal story. Please use a common file format, and it's very important that all media used is either original or properly credited to the source. If you have any questions about the technical requirements or need help with editing tools, feel free to reach out.
